message:
test(bd-34ti): add oidc.rs coverage for userinfo, scope filtering, and JWT fields

Cover userinfo with missing claims, comprehensive profile scope field
filtering, custom claims exclusion from scope filter, ID token field
population (azp, at_hash, auth_time), base64url URL-safety, discovery
document serde skip-nones, and nonce round-trip through raw JWT payload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
